mission.title: Install and Configure Higress
mission.description: Higress is a CNCF cloud-native API gateway built on Istio and Envoy, supporting AI gateway capabilities, multiple protocols, and WebAssembly plugin extensibility. It functions as a Kubernetes ingress controller and Gateway API implementation.

steps.title: Add the Higress Helm repository
steps.description:
Add the official Higress Helm chart repository.

```bash
helm repo add higress https://higress.io/helm-charts
helm repo update
```

steps.title: Install Higress using Helm
steps.description:
Install Higress into a dedicated namespace.

```bash
helm install higress higress/higress --namespace higress-system --create-namespace
```

steps.title: Verify Higress pods are running
steps.description:
Check that the Higress gateway and controller pods are running.

```bash
kubectl get pods -n higress-system
```

> You should see higress-gateway and higress-controller pods in Running state.

steps.title: Verify Higress ingress class
steps.description:
Confirm the Higress IngressClass was created.

```bash
kubectl get ingressclass
```

> You should see a 'higress' ingress class.

uninstall.title: Uninstall Higress
uninstall.description:
Remove Higress from your cluster.

```bash
helm uninstall higress -n higress-system
```
